news.t: RAAX Recap: When the System Strains, Real Assets Lead
This commodities strategy can protect you from inflation, scarcity and even price declines
VanEck Announces Year-End Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
VanEck Launches Actively Managed Commodity Strategy ETF (PIT), Focused on Seeking Maximum Risk-adjusted Returns

overview.description: The VanEck Commodity Strategy ETF (PIT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad market commodities. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in commodity securities from the energy, precious metals, industrial metals, agriculture and livestock sectors. The fund uses an optimized process to maximize risk-adjusted returns. PIT was launched on Dec 20, 2022 and is issued by VanEck.

data.title: RAAX Recap: When the System Strains, Real Assets Lead
data.text: Global fault lines are shifting. Real assets are no longer just a hedge, they're at the center of how resilient portfolios navigated a turbulent and geopolitically charged quarter.

data.title: This commodities strategy can protect you from inflation, scarcity and even price declines
data.text: A dynamic commodities strategy can enhance an investment portfolio's returns over the long term.

data.title: VanEck Announces Year-End Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announced today the 2025 annual distributions per share for its VanEck equity exchange-traded funds.
